=== Metadata ===
Effect version: 3.19.19

/.src/schemaUnionOfLiterals_preview.ts(5,24): warning TS377038: A Schema.Union of multiple Schema.Literal calls can be simplified to a single Schema.Literal call. effect(schemaUnionOfLiterals)


==== /.src/schemaUnionOfLiterals_preview.ts (1 errors) ====
    // @effect-diagnostics *:off
    // @effect-diagnostics schemaUnionOfLiterals:warning
    import * as Schema from "effect/Schema"
    
    export const preview = Schema.Union(Schema.Literal("a"), Schema.Literal("b"))
                           ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
!!! warning TS377038: A Schema.Union of multiple Schema.Literal calls can be simplified to a single Schema.Literal call. effect(schemaUnionOfLiterals)
